name: Clay (AI-Powered Lead Enrichment & Automation)

auth.notes: Clay API key; OAuth for data source integrations

performance.notes: Enrichment speed varies by data source; bulk async processing

agent_readiness.notes: Data enrichment and GTM automation platform. Waterfall enrichment: tries multiple data sources (Apollo, Clearbit, LinkedIn, Hunter) in sequence until populated. 100+ integrations. AI columns (Claygent) for research automation. CRM sync (HubSpot, Salesforce). Webhook triggers. Outbound sequence integration (Instantly, Salesloft). Popular for B2B outbound sales teams building targeted lead lists. API for table manipulation and enrichment triggers.

gotchas: Credit consumption can be expensive at scale
Data source accuracy varies (not Clay's data — third party)
API documentation less mature than core product
Steep learning curve for waterfall configuration
best_when: B2B outbound sales teams enriching lead lists from multiple sources
GTM automation: find → enrich → verify → sequence
Research automation with Claygent AI for custom data points
Marketing operations teams building ICP-filtered prospect databases
avoid_when: Non-sales data enrichment pipelines (traditional ETL tools better)
summary: Clay is the AI-powered B2B data enrichment and GTM automation platform. Waterfall enrichment across 100+ sources (Apollo, LinkedIn, Hunter, Clearbit). AI research automation via Claygent. CRM sync (HubSpot, Salesforce). Outbound sequence integration. Popular for SDR teams building enriched, personalized prospect databases. Credit-based pricing for enrichment calls.
